routing_confidence.reason: The task was scoped to repository documentation edits and local verification.

lessons: Real case studies should identify their mode and avoid upgrading Manual Mode evidence into Full Mode claims.
Public protocol promotion should separate repository proof, runtime proof, and production proof.
next_routing_hints: Use a live runtime task for the next Full Mode case study.
Route non-HERDR adapter work to an implementation task, not a documentation-only task.
privacy_notes: No private machine paths, credentials, user data, or unreleased runtime logs are included.
